features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bubble Dash
actions.description: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

tactical_info.combat_role: Escape Artist - Tiny aquatic creature with evasion
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Bubble Dash for quick repositioning underwater
tactical_info.key_abilities: Bubble Dash avoids opportunity attacks, high stealth
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for environmental flavor and aquatic scenery
